title: screening.review_requested payload (v1)
description: Emitted by the agentic screener's flag_for_human_review tool when the model decides a candidate needs a human look. Producer: screening-service (apps/screening-service/src/lib/screener-tools.ts). Rides the SCREENING_EVENTS stream. NOTE: no subscriber consumes this subject today (producer-only / honest gap); it is published as a real autonomy action and audited via logs.

requestedByAgent.description: Always true here — the request came from the agent tool.

requestedByUserId.description: The user id the agent run was attributed to (often "system" for event-driven runs), or null.
